title: Fix OPFSBackend delete() error handling to match other backends
description: ARCH gap: OPFSBackend.delete() throws if path not found, unlike AgenticStoreBackend/NodeFsBackend which silently no-op (return false). Change OPFSBackend.delete() to catch NotFoundError and return false instead of throwing. Ensure consistent behavior: delete() returns boolean, never throws on missing path. Target: ARCH gap 'OPFSBackend.delete() has no error handling — throws if path not found'.
